zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Chiny於1205年出生在比利時盧布格尼時，她的父親Louis IV comte de Chiny33歲，母親Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes35歲。她於1224年與Graaf Arnold IV van Loon結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Chiny于1205年出生在比利时盧布格尼时，她的父亲Louis IV comte de Chiny33岁，母亲Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes35岁。她于1224年与Graaf Arnold IV van Loon结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1271年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: from the feminine form of the personal name   Chino  .
Italian (Sicily): nickname from chinu, china ‘full of water, bloated, fat’.
English: probably a variant of the extinct name Chiney through association with the country-name.

variants.name: Chino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Avelino, Ezequiel, Fernando, Francisco, Homero, Humberto, Joaquin, Jose Hector, Manuel, Maricela, Paulino.  Japanese Aki, Hideki, Hirohito, Hiroki, Kazumi, Kazuo, Shigeru, Taro, Yuriko, Yutaka.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico): from Mexican Spanish adjective chino ‘curly’. This surname is also common among Native Americans (Pueblos) in NM.
Hispanic and Amerindian (Peru and Bolivia): nickname from chino ‘person of mixed Amerindian and European parentage’ or ‘servant’, a word of Quechuan origin.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Chiny was born in 1205, in Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgium, her father, Louis IV comte de Chiny, was 33 and her mother, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, was 35. She married Graaf Arnold IV van Loon in 1224. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1271, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Chiny est née en 1205, à Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Louis IV comte de Chiny, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Graaf Arnold IV van Loon en 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1271, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Chiny 1205 in Chiny, Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis IV comte de Chiny 33 und ihre Mutter Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes 35. Sie hat 1224 Graaf Arnold IV van Loon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1271 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Chiny è nata il nel 1205 nel Chiny, Lussemburgo, Belgio, sua padre, Louis IV comte de Chiny, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Graaf Arnold IV van Loon nel 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1271, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Chinyが1205年にベルギールクセンボウルグチニーで生まれた時，父Louis IV comte de Chinyは33歳，母Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesは35歳であった。1224年にGraaf Arnold IV van Loonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Chiny(이)가 1205년 벨기에 루세보우르그 친이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis IV comte de Chiny(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1224년 Graaf Arnold IV van Loon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Chiny nasceu em 1205, em Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Louis IV comte de Chiny, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Graaf Arnold IV van Loon em 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1271, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Chiny родилась в 1205 г. в местности чини, луксембург, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Louis IV comte de Chiny было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graaf Arnold IV van Loon в 1224 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1271 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Chiny nació en 1205, en Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Louis IV comte de Chiny, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Graaf Arnold IV van Loon en 1224. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1271, a la edad de 66 años.
